mapper.sql: id, user_id, target_type, target_id, feedback_result, content, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM feedback f INNER JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id AND u.delete_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN warning w ON f.target_type = 'WARNING' AND f.target_id = CAST(w.id AS CHAR) AND w.delete_flag = 0 WHERE

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, u.username, f.target_type, f.target_id, f.feedback_result, f.content, f.gmt_create FROM feedback f INNER JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id AND u.delete_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN warning w ON f.target_type = 'WARNING' AND f.target_id = CAST(w.id AS CHAR) AND w.delete_flag = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY f.gmt_create DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.pageSize}

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, u.username, f.target_type, f.target_id, f.feedback_result, f.content, f.gmt_create FROM feedback f INNER JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id AND u.delete_flag = 0 WHERE f.id = #{id} AND f.delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM feedback WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET delete_flag = 1, gmt_modified = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warning WHERE id = #{warningId} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_chat_message WHERE id = #{messageId} AND role = 'assistant' AND message_status IN ('COMPLETED', 'STOPPED') AND delete_flag = 0
AND message_type = #{messageType}

SELECT w.id AS warning_id, w.title AS title, c.name AS crop_name, p.name AS pest_name, w.warning_date AS warning_date, w.warning_type AS warning_type, w.risk_level AS risk_level, w.risk_score AS risk_score FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id AND c.delete_flag = 0 INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id AND p.delete_flag = 0 WHERE w.id = #{warningId} AND w.delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(m.content) > 200 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(m.content, 1, 200), '...') ELSE m.content END FROM ai_chat_message m WHERE m.chat_id = #{chatId} AND m.id < #{beforeMessageId} AND m.role = 'user' AND m.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE feedback
feedback_result = #{feedbackResult},
content = #{content},
gmt_modified = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
